title: Use strong cipher algorithms for JWT
description: JSON Web Tokens (JWTs) signed with weak algorithms or no signature verification are vulnerable to tampering and forgery attacks. Proper JWT security requires strong signing algorithms and signature verification.
recommendation: Use strong signing algorithms like RS256 or ES256 for JWTs and always verify signatures.

noncompliant.description: Using weak signing algorithms, short keys, or skipping signature verification makes JWTs vulnerable to tampering.

compliant.description: Using strong algorithms like RS256 or ES256, proper key sizes, and always validating signatures and algorithms.

checks.message: Use strong signing algorithms like RS256 or ES256 for JWTs and always verify signatures.
